# libre-mcp

> A stdio MCP server for controlling LibreOffice (Writer, Calc & Impress) over UNO.
> Runs LibreOffice headless and exposes document, spreadsheet, and presentation
> tools to MCP clients; exports to PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, and more.

## Docs

- [Install & connect](https://libre-mcp.krondor.org/docs/install/)
- [Tools](https://libre-mcp.krondor.org/docs/tools/)
- [Development](https://libre-mcp.krondor.org/docs/development/)

## Source

- [GitHub](https://github.com/krondor-corp/libre-mcp)
